_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the workstation-in-use / machine-template slot over-allocation scenario (job-faulted-session-console-contention playbook, branch 3). The agent chains: folders list -> jobs list --state Faulted -> jobs get (Info: 'workstation is in use') -> jobs logs -> jobs list --state Running (two other accounts seated in the 2 available RDP slots) -> machines list (template exposes 4 runtimes on a host that seats 2) -> users get (LoginToConsole=false rules out console contention). Keys are stable.

rules._doc: Proxy any docsai query to the real uip CLI; cache in _cache/.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.
